data.name: DisplayIndexPositive
data.value: The display index for the product category must be a positive number.

data.name: MealPlanNameRequired
data.value: The meal plan requires a name.

data.name: MealPlanRequiresRecipes
data.value: The meal plan requires at least one recipe.

data.name: ProductQuantityPositive
data.value: The quantity for the product must be a positive number.

data.name: ShoppingListNameRequired
data.value: The shopping list requires a name.

data.name: ShoppingListRequiresProducts
data.value: The recipe requires at least one product.

data.name: ShoppingListRequired
data.value: Please select a shopping list for the product.

data.name: ShopNameRequired
data.value: The shop requires a name.

data.name: ShopRequiresCategoryOrder
data.value: The shop requires at least product category order.

data.name: UnitRequired
data.value: Please select a unit of measurement for the product.

data.name: NoShopsAvailable
data.value: No shops available.

data.name: ShoppingListGenerateFailed
data.value: Failed to generate shopping list.

data.name: SelectShopFirst
data.value: Select a shop first.

data.name: NoMealPlansFound
data.value: No meal plans found.

data.name: NoRecipesFound
data.value: No recipes found.

data.name: NewPasswordsDoNotMatch
data.value: New passwords do not match.

data.name: PasswordChangedSuccess
data.value: Password changed successfully.

data.name: ProfileUpdatedSuccess
data.value: Profile updated.

data.name: ForgotPasswordEmailSent
data.value: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.

data.name: PasswordsDoNotMatch
data.value: Passwords do not match.

data.name: PasswordResetSuccess
data.value: Password reset successfully. Please log in.

data.name: RegistrationSuccess
data.value: Registration successful. Please log in.
